spoken: A huge Hollywood megastar walked off "Knocked Up" over a birthing scene. Seth Rogen now claims the actor quit the 2007 comedy during development. Rogen says the star was uncomfortable with a graphic childbirth scene. The film ultimately starred Katherine Heigl opposite Rogen. That birthing scene is a major plot point. Rogen shared the anecdote with Female First, but didn't name names. So who was almost in "Knocked Up" instead? Full story at The Screen Report. Link in bio. Any guesses for the mystery star?
